name: Cyber & Technology
description: Standalone cyber liability and technology errors & omissions insurance for US and Americas markets

content.description: US-focused cyber liability and technology professional liability insurance. The Americas cyber market is the most mature globally, driven by extensive state breach notification laws, SEC disclosure requirements, and CCPA/state privacy regulations. Covers first-party losses (business interruption, data restoration, ransom payments, crisis management) and third-party claims (privacy liability, network security liability, media liability). Technology E&O provides coverage for software failures, cloud outages, and professional negligence. Key sectors include healthcare, financial services, retail, and critical infrastructure.
content.productExamples: Standalone cyber, Technology E&O, Privacy liability, Ransomware response, Network security, Media liability, Cyber excess
